product_information.product_name: Earth Line Vitamine E Oogcontour Crème 35 ML
product_information.description: Deze oogcontour crème verzorgt, hydrateert en beschermt op milde en delicate wijze. De kwetsbare huid rondom de ogen voelt gladder en egaler aan.

inferred_information.raw_ingredients: Aqua (Water), Rosa Damascena Flower Water**, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil**, Sodium Cetearyl Sulfate, Cetyl Palmitate, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter**, Levulinic Acid, P-Anisic Acid, Sodium Levulinate, Lavandula Hybrida Grosso Herb Oil, Xanthan Gum, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Phytic Acid, Alcohol, Citrus Sinensis Peel Oil Expressed, Tocopherol, Lemongrass Oil, Cananga Odorata Oil/ Extract, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil**, Salix Alba Bark Extract**, Citrus Aurantium Bergamia Peel Oil, Disodium Phosphate, Lactic Acid, Potassium Phosphate, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate, Benzyl Benzoate*, Beta-Caryophyllene*, Camphor*, Citral*, Geraniol*, Geranyl Acetate*, Hexamethylindanopyran*, Limonene*, Linalool*, Linalyl Acetate*, Pinene*, Terpineol*.
inferred_information.legal_grade: Deze oogcontour crème verzorgt, hydrateert en beschermt op milde en delicate wijze.
